meta.source_note: Real figures published in the Clusters paper (Occasional Paper 15/2025) — not derived from ECIPE's internal funding database and not illustrative. Established-cluster counts are the paper's full 45-cluster ranking (Table A) tallied by region; quasi-cluster counts are the paper's own Tier 1 + Tier 2 totals by region, stated directly in Section 6 (2 US, 5 UK/Canada/Australia, 15 China, 34 EU, 30 Rest of the World; totalling the paper's reported 86 quasi-clusters worldwide).
